ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a general doughnut food product class; no specific salted caramel chocolate variant exists. Closest parent used.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 code A0FKP covers doughnuts as a category; no specific flavour variant code exists for salted caramel chocolate doughnut.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No specific SNOMED CT concept exists for salted caramel chocolate doughnut. General food item codes are not sufficiently specific to be defensible.

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard Dunkin' Donuts salted caramel chocolate doughnut, approximately 75 g, as served at the Funan outlet in Singapore.

nutrient_source.title: Cake-type doughnut, chocolate-glazed or chocolate-frosted (USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy, NDB No. 18249)
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service — FoodData Central SR Legacy
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: USDA SR Legacy entry for chocolate-frosted cake-type doughnut used as the closest defensible analogue. The Dunkin' Donuts salted caramel chocolate doughnut is a yeast-raised doughnut with dark chocolate frosting, caramel drizzle, and sea salt topping. Sodium value has been adjusted upward to reflect the sea salt topping (estimated +40 mg/100 g above the USDA baseline of approximately 370 mg/100 g). All other macro values are drawn directly from the USDA SR Legacy chocolate-glazed doughnut profile. Confidence is medium due to the adapted match.

gi_source.title: Doughnut, cake-type — GI value from University of Sydney GI Database; Atkinson FS, Foster-Powell K, Brand-Miller JC. International Tables of Glycemic Index and Glycemic Load Values: 2008. Diabetes Care 2008;31(12):2281-2283.
gi_source.organization: University of Sydney GI Database / Diabetes Care Journal
gi_source.source_match_notes: GI of 76 is drawn from the University of Sydney GI Database entry for cake-type doughnut (GI=76, glucose reference). The salted caramel chocolate doughnut is a yeast-raised variant with chocolate frosting and caramel drizzle; the high sugar and refined flour content supports use of the cake-type doughnut GI as a conservative analogous estimate. Glycemic load per serving calculated as: (76 × 39.0 g available carbohydrate per 75 g serving) / 100 = 29.6 (rounded to one decimal place). Available carbohydrate per serving = 52.0 × 0.75 = 39.0 g.

hypertension.key_factor: High sodium content from sea salt topping and processed ingredients
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit or avoid this doughnut due to its elevated sodium content of approximately 410 mg per 100 g (approximately 308 mg per serving), which contributes meaningfully to the recommended daily sodium limit of 2000 mg.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High glycemic index (76), high sugar content (28.5 g/100 g), and high refined carbohydrate load
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should avoid or strictly limit this doughnut, as its high GI of 76 and glycemic load of approximately 29.6 per serving will cause rapid postprandial blood glucose elevation; the high sugar and refined flour content further impair glycaemic control.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High saturated fat (8.2 g/100 g), trans fat (0.3 g/100 g), and high sugar content
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with or at risk of cardiovascular disease should avoid regular consumption of this doughnut due to its saturated fat content of 8.2 g/100 g, detectable trans fat at 0.3 g/100 g, and high sugar load, all of which are associated with adverse lipid profiles and increased cardiovascular risk.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The Salted Caramel Chocolate Donut is a deep-fried, yeast-raised doughnut sold by Dunkin' Donuts in Singapore, including at the Funan outlet. It is frosted with a dark chocolate glaze and finished with a drizzle of caramel sauce and a sprinkle of sea salt crystals, creating a flavour profile that balances rich bittersweet chocolate, sweet caramel, and a savoury salt contrast. The dough is made from enriched wheat flour, sugar, eggs, milk, and yeast, then deep-fried in vegetable shortening to produce a light, airy interior with a slightly crisp exterior. The dark chocolate frosting adds a dense, glossy coating, while the caramel drizzle contributes additional sweetness and a sticky texture. The sea salt topping enhances the overall flavour complexity. Nutritionally, this doughnut is energy-dense at approximately 403 kcal per 100 g, with a high carbohydrate content of 52 g/100 g, of which 28.5 g is sugar, and a fat content of 20.5 g/100 g including 8.2 g saturated fat and detectable trans fat. The glycemic index is high at 76, making it unsuitable for individuals managing blood glucose levels. The sodium content is elevated at approximately 410 mg/100 g due to the sea salt topping. This product is classified as ultra-processed and is not recommended for individuals with Type 2 Diabetes, hypertension, or cardiovascular disease. It is suitable for vegetarians and is generally considered halal-certified at Dunkin' Donuts Singapore outlets, though consumers should verify current certification status. It contains gluten, eggs, milk, and soy allergens.
common_user_queries: How many calories in a Dunkin Donuts salted caramel chocolate donut?
Is the salted caramel chocolate donut halal in Singapore?
What is the sugar content of a chocolate caramel doughnut?
Can diabetics eat a salted caramel chocolate donut?
What allergens are in a Dunkin Donuts chocolate donut?
Is the Dunkin salted caramel donut high GI?
How much sodium is in a salted caramel chocolate doughnut?
What is the glycemic load of a chocolate doughnut?

confidence_reason: No exact nutritional data for this specific Dunkin' Donuts Singapore product was available in any approved primary source. Values are adapted from the USDA SR Legacy chocolate-frosted cake-type doughnut entry, which is the closest defensible analogue in an approved secondary global source. Sodium has been adjusted upward to account for the sea salt topping. GI is estimated from the University of Sydney GI Database cake-type doughnut entry (GI=76). Confidence is medium due to the adapted nutrient match and analogous GI estimate.
notes: Vitamin D is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy source for this doughnut category. Sodium value of 410 mg/100 g reflects an upward adjustment of approximately 40 mg/100 g above the USDA SR Legacy baseline to account for the sea salt topping characteristic of this product. Trans fat value of 0.3 g/100 g is drawn from the USDA SR Legacy entry and may vary by formulation; consumers should check current product labelling. Vitamin C is 0.0 g/100 g; this is confirmed zero per USDA SR Legacy as doughnuts contain no meaningful vitamin C. Halal status is based on general Dunkin' Donuts Singapore halal certification; consumers should verify current MUIS certification. The food_name has been expanded from the input 'Salted Caramel Chocolate' to 'Salted Caramel Chocolate Donut' to provide a canonical, unambiguous English food name. The cuisine field has been corrected from the input 'Coffee' (a field survey platform category tag) to 'Western / American' reflecting the actual origin of the doughnut product. The food_group has been corrected from 'Mixed' to 'Snacks' as doughnuts are classified as sweet snack pastries.
